rows.label: tev032201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Rutantan about Ma-non technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Rutantan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Rutantan how the Ma-non
fared during the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Rutantan about the Ma-non language.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0001
rows.name:
It's no wonder the Growth want our
technology. I mean, it's the finest
in in in all the universe, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hmm? What's with that look? Are you wondering how
these silly, lazy Ma-non can be the producers of the
most jaw-dropping breakthroughs in the cosmos?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0003
rows.name:
We aren't fools, are we? We just have to invent
something once, then never worry about it again.
I mean, who works more than they have to?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heck, we invent things
BECAUSE we're lazy, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0008
rows.name:
I suppose the Growth's tech
has its own merits? One might
even call it "advanced."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'd like to study it if
if given the chance...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0010
rows.name:
But all they seem to produce is weapons,
right? And we hate weapons. So I'm not so
sure I'll like what I find, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Lara's boyfriend was killed during the
attack, wasn't he? It's very very sad...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0017
rows.name:
I tried bringing him some yummy
sweets and pretty flowers to to
help him feel better, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0018
rows.name:
He told me once that people
like to be surprised with these
kinds of things, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Anyway, I had to do something, because I
was afraid all that water coming from his
eyes might end up drowning me, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0020
rows.name:
You humans sure are good at
speaking Ma-non, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0021
rows.name:
...What's that? You're NOT speaking
Ma-non? Well, how how odd.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Now that I think about it, how could you
you even pronounce it? Our speech organs
are totally different from yours...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's a bit...creepy? The understanding,
I mean. How is this even working...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Rutantan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0011
rows.name:
We need to put our fear of weapons aside, don't
you think? We must start making them so that you
humans can can fight and bring peace to Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0012
rows.name:
The Ma-non do not like to
participate in acts of war, but
we are also not fools, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0013
rows.name:
And if we leave the Growth
to their ways, I imagine no
one will ever be happy...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0014
rows.name: I must thank you for teaching us this, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032201_MSG0015
rows.name:
And I must thank Lara, too, because if I do
not, I imagine he will likely hug me again?
And he nearly broke my my my bones last time![ST:wait ]
